task_completion.description: Verify that the required layers are created with the correct colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Layer List panel in LibreCAD. You should see layers named FOUL_LINES (White/Black depending on theme), BASES (White/Black), MOUND (Red), MARKINGS (Yellow), and DIMENSIONS (Cyan).

task_completion.description: Verify that the foul lines are drawn at 45 and 135 degrees from the origin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main drawing area. There should be two long lines originating from a single point (the origin) forming a V-shape with a 90-degree angle between them.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of a pentagonal Home Plate at the origin and a rectangular Pitcher's Plate on the centerline.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look near the origin (intersection of the foul lines) for a 5-sided polygon (Home Plate). Further up the bisecting centerline (Y-axis), there should be a small, wide rectangle representing the Pitcher's Plate.

task_completion.description: Verify that 1st, 2nd, and 3rd bases are placed correctly to form a baseball diamond.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for three square shapes placed to form a diamond with Home Plate. Two squares (1st and 3rd base) should be on the foul lines, and one square (2nd base) should be on the centerline (Y-axis) furthest from Home Plate.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of the running lane offset from the 1st base line.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an additional line segment running parallel to the right-side foul line (1st base line), starting roughly halfway between Home Plate and 1st base.

task_completion.description: Verify that the layout is saved as baseball_infield.dxf in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the LibreCAD window title bar, which should display 'baseball_infield.dxf', or look for a terminal/file explorer window showing the file saved in /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used LibreCAD to create or view the drawing.
integrity.visual_evidence: The LibreCAD application interface should be visible in the screenshots with the baseball layout open in the workspace.

integrity.description: Verify that the layout consists of CAD vector lines and shapes, not an imported picture.
integrity.visual_evidence: The drawing should look like standard CAD lines and geometric shapes, potentially with selection handles or grid snapping visible, rather than a rasterized image or photograph of a baseball field.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually constructed the geometry or used valid CAD commands rather than just moving a pre-existing completed file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of drawing steps, layer creation, or command line usage in LibreCAD's command prompt area across the trajectory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Bases are 90 feet apart. The pitcher's rubber front edge is 60.5 feet from the home plate apex. The pitcher's plate is 2 feet by 0.5 feet. Foul lines extend at 45° and 135° from home plate. Home plate is a pentagon. Note: The task specifically requires 15-inch square bases and 2nd base centered at 127.28 feet on the Y-axis, which the agent must follow despite recent MLB changes to 18-inch bases.
